s: A recreation of the classic Drop7 puzzle game for Android
d:
DropCount is a faithful recreation of the classic Drop7 puzzle game for Android, built with Kotlin and Jetpack Compose.

Core Gameplay
  • 7×7 Grid: Classic Drop7 gameplay with numbered and solid discs
  • Matches: Destroy discs by creating lengths of discs matching the disc numbers
  • Chain Reactions: Create cascading combos for higher scores
  • Dynamic Difficulty: New rows appear from the bottom based on game mode

Game Modes

1. Normal Mode
  • New row every 30 drops, then 29, 28, 27... (decreasing)

2. Challenge Mode
  • Configurable difficulty presets: Easy, Medium, Hard, Extreme
  • Fixed drop rate for fixed challenge

3. Sequence Mode
  • Same rules as Normal mode
  • Deterministic disc generation for puzzle-solving
  • Predictable sequences for strategic planning

Features
  • High Score Tracking: Per-mode high score persistence
  • Beautiful UI: Modern Material 3 design with gradient backgrounds
  • Animations: Smooth disc drops and break effects
  • Pause/Resume: Pause the game anytime

How to Play
1. Tap a column to drop the current disc
2. Match numbers: A disc breaks when contiguous discs in its row OR column equal its number
3. Chain reactions: Breaking discs can trigger more breaks for bonus points
4. Solid discs: Appear solid gray, crack once after first adjacent break, reveal a number after second adjacent break
5. Survive: Avoid filling the past the top row

DropCount is completely free and open source, with no ads or in-app purchases.
